offer: VapeOS live demo for AI inventory search across messy retail product catalogs

statusNotes.approved: Email-ready for Resend dry-run after final human review.
statusNotes.manual_form: Contact form only; do not pass to Resend.
statusNotes.needs_research: Promising local candidate but contact details or site quality still need verification.
statusNotes.rejected: Do not include in the campaign.

prospects.siteStrength: Basic site with contact form, flavor menu, and product-category list.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: No searchable live inventory for box mods, tanks, RDA/RTA, e-liquid, squonks, or starter kits.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The site lists a flavor menu and broad product categories but asks visitors to send a message instead of searching inventory.

prospects.siteStrength: Contact page with address, phone, email, and message form.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: No searchable product catalog or product browsing surface visible from the contact page.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The contact page is useful for reaching the downtown shop but does not help shoppers look up products before visiting.

prospects.siteStrength: Small local site with contact page and newsletter signup.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: The site promotes vape and smoke products but does not expose searchable inventory or product availability.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The contact page frames the shop around vaping and relaxation but leaves product discovery to phone or email.

prospects.siteStrength: Local business site with product categories, service area, and contact form.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Lists disposables, vape mods, vape juice, CBD, and glass without searchable item-level inventory.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The site emphasizes disposable vapes, vape mods, vape juice, CBD, and glass for Gaffney and Spartanburg-area shoppers.

prospects.siteStrength: Local landing page with trust copy, address, phone, email, and form template.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Premium product positioning is present, but there is no visible searchable inventory or category browsing.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The Anderson page highlights premium vaping brands and lab-tested quality, which gives a strong product-selection angle.

prospects.siteStrength: Wix-style shop overview with store story, services, and contact section.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Mentions beginner vape kits, cloud-chaser products, hookah, CBD, pipes, and Kratom without searchable stock.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The site says the shop carries products from beginner vape kits through cloud-chaser and coil-builder needs.

prospects.siteStrength: About page with broad product positioning and contact information.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Highlights kratom, kava, CBD, THC, Delta 8/9, glass, and smoke-shop essentials without search.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The page emphasizes a wide selection across kratom, kava, CBD, THC, and smoke-shop essentials.

prospects.siteStrength: Directory listing with hours, payment options, product tags, and brand names.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Broad brand and product list appears only as static tags, not a searchable catalog.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The listing names many product and brand categories, including disposables, pods, Kratom, Delta 8/9, Lost Mary, SMOK, and Geek Bar.

prospects.siteStrength: Directory profile with address, phone, email, reviews, and hours.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: No owned catalog or product search surfaced in the profile.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The profile shows a highly rated Summerville smoke and vape shop but gives shoppers no product lookup path.

prospects.siteStrength: Directory listing describes broad smoke-shop product assortment and categories.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Product range is long and varied, but discovery appears to depend on static listing text rather than inventory search.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The listing names disposables, e-juice, vape pens, CBD, Kratom, Delta products, glass, and cigar accessories.

prospects.siteStrength: Directory profile with email, phone, address, and product keywords.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: No owned ecommerce or searchable inventory was visible from the profile.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The profile highlights e-cigarettes, e-liquids, vapor products, batteries, and vape-store search terms.

prospects.siteStrength: Local directory profile with address, phone, and email.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: No product browsing or inventory search is visible in the directory profile.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The profile identifies the Anderson vaporizer store and exposes contact details, but not product lookup.

prospects.siteStrength: Directory profile with phone, website, email, address, and hours.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: The profile describes e-liquids, devices, and accessories, but does not provide searchable inventory.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The listing positions the shop as a one-stop source for premium e-liquids, devices, and accessories.

prospects.siteStrength: Directory profile with address, phone, email, reviews, and hours.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: No searchable product catalog or owned product page is visible from the profile.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The profile shows a Columbia vape and wellness shop with strong review count but no product lookup path.

prospects.siteStrength: Directory profile with brand summary, local address, phone, website, and email.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: The profile describes personal vaporizers, batteries, clearomizers, accessories, and premium e-juices, but not searchable availability.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The listing describes multiple vape product classes and premium e-juices for Myrtle Beach shoppers.

prospects.siteStrength: Local site with contact form and visible product breadth.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Mentions vape mods, e-juices, CBD, THCa gummies, Kratom, disposables, tobacco, cigars, hookah, and smoking accessories without searchable inventory.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The Manning site lists a wide range of vape, tobacco, CBD, THCa, Kratom, and hookah products.

prospects.siteStrength: Rewards/directory page with address, phone, hours, and business description.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: The page lists product variety but does not provide an owned searchable catalog.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The listing says the shop carries mods, batteries, coils, juice, pods, snacks, phone accessories, Delta-8, CBD, and Kratom.

prospects.siteStrength: Vending service site, not a vape retail storefront.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Business model is machine placement and maintenance rather than shop inventory lookup.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The site targets local business owners for vending machines, so it is not the first-fit retail shop outreach target.

prospects.siteStrength: Mature ecommerce site with product pages and online purchasing.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Already has strong ecommerce and product detail pages.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The site appears too ecommerce-forward for the first weak-inventory campaign segment.

prospects.siteStrength: Multi-location brand site with newsletter and corporate contact.
prospects.inventoryOrLeadGap: Multi-location/corporate structure makes it less suitable for the independent-shop test batch.
prospects.personalizationNotes: The site lists multiple North Carolina and South Carolina locations and a corporate address.
